summary: 15 findings: 2 HIGH (PyInstaller separator, flat copy overwrites), 9 MEDIUM (cross-platform, encoding, hardcoded values), 2 LOW (inconsistent names, hardcoded model filename), 2 INFO (no AI patterns detected)

entries.title: PyInstaller --add-data separator incompatible with Unix
entries.problem: Uses semicolon separator (Windows syntax) in --add-data which silently fails on Unix/macOS.
entries.fix: Use conditional separator: sep = ';' if sys.platform == 'win32' else ':'

entries.title: os.chdir breaks relative path resolution
entries.problem: os.chdir(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))) modifies working directory, breaking relative path operations from project root.
entries.fix: Remove chdir call; use absolute paths or resolve relative to __file__

entries.title: Hardcoded Unix-style path in path construction
entries.problem: Path string uses forward slashes in string literal, inconsistent with Path object usage elsewhere.

entries.title: Inno Setup uses Windows backslashes incompatible with Unix build hosts
entries.problem: Source paths use python_embeddable\* with backslashes which won't resolve on Unix.
entries.fix: Replace backslashes with forward slashes (Inno Setup accepts forward slashes)

entries.title: pip command invoked without .cmd extension on Windows
entries.problem: subprocess.run(['pip', 'download', ...]) may fail on Windows if pip is not in PATH.
entries.fix: Use sys.executable + '-m pip' for reliable cross-platform invocation

entries.title: copy_app_files creates flat directory causing file overwrites
entries.problem: Files copied to build_installer/app/ using only file.name, not directory structure. Same-named files from different directories overwrite each other silently.
entries.fix: Preserve directory structure: dest = Path('build_installer/app') / file.relative_to(Path('.'))

entries.title: File writes without explicit encoding in build.py
entries.problem: write_text() calls lack encoding parameter, using system default which varies (UTF-8 on Unix, cp1252 on Windows).
entries.fix: Add encoding='utf-8' to all write_text() calls

entries.title: File writes without explicit encoding in build_installer.py
entries.problem: open() calls for README.txt and setup.iss lack encoding, risking UTF-8 corruption on Windows.
entries.fix: Add encoding='utf-8' to all open() calls

entries.title: Hardcoded package list duplicates requirements.txt
entries.problem: check_dependencies() has a hardcoded list of packages that duplicates requirements.txt, creating two sources of truth that will drift.
entries.fix: Load package list dynamically from requirements.txt

entries.title: Hardcoded constants should be module-level constants
entries.problem: Directory names, executable name, and spec file path are hardcoded in multiple locations.
entries.fix: Define BUILD_DIR, DIST_DIR, APP_NAME, SPEC_FILE as module-level constants

entries.title: Hardcoded company name, URLs, and version in Inno Setup template
entries.problem: Inno Setup template has placeholder values (Your Company Name, https://yourcompany.com, 1.0.0) that should be constants.
entries.fix: Define VERSION, COMPANY, COMPANY_URL at module level and interpolate

entries.title: Unbounded array access without index validation
entries.problem: embeddings[chunk_id] accessed without verifying embeddings has same length as ids, risking IndexError.
entries.fix: Add bounds check: embeddings[chunk_id] if chunk_id < len(embeddings) else None

entries.title: No validation for empty database result
entries.problem: If ChromaDB returns empty results, script silently creates empty output files without warning.
entries.fix: Add empty result check after fetching data

entries.title: Inconsistent executable names between build scripts
entries.fix: Define shared constant in a config module

entries.title: Hardcoded model filename in user instructions
entries.problem: README instructions suggest specific filename qwen3-1.7b-q4_k_m.gguf which may not match actual model file.
entries.fix: Make instruction generic or scan for .gguf files at runtime
